string.text: Commander...? I never thought we'd meet again. I'm a little... happy... I guess.
Commander, there's a whole pile of work waiting for you... but it's okay if you don't feel like doing it...
Are my drawings hard to understand? If you wish to understand them, I'm willing to share my thoughts from when I was drawing them.
Can you come with me, Vector?
Okay Vector, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
If you still need me, I'll put my all into continuing to function, to be with you always.
